mapper.sql: id, storage_root_id, parent_id, owner_user_id, name, relative_path, item_type, size_bytes, mime_type, hash_sha256, privacy_mode, privacy_password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM file_item WHERE storage_root_id = #{storageRootId} AND relative_path = #{relativePath} LIMIT 1
